[Enteromorpha compressa var. intestinalis (Linnaeus) Hamel, moreEnteromorpha intestinalis f. maxima J.Agardh, Ilea intestinalis (Linnaeus) Leiblein, Scytosiphon intestinalis var. nematodes Wallroth, Tetraspora intestinalis (Linnaeus) Desvaux, Ulva bulbosa var. intestinalis (Linnaeus) Hariot, Ulva enteromorpha var. intestinalis (Linnaeus) Le Jolis]
